title: Home, Sweet Home Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A building where a family lives, with walls, a roof and rooms.
rounds.explanation: house: A building where a family lives, with walls, a roof and rooms.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A room with a sink and a toilet, used for washing.
rounds.explanation: bathroom: A room with a sink and a toilet, used for washing.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: An opening in a wall with glass that lets light in.
rounds.explanation: window: An opening in a wall with glass that lets light in.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A set of rooms to live in inside a bigger building.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A room where people sleep and keep their clothes.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A long, soft seat made for two or three people.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: My family lives in a house with a small garden.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The bird made a nest in the tall tree.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: I wash my hands in the bathroom.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: In which room do people cook the family meal?
rounds.explanation: The kitchen is the room where food is cooked. People sleep in the bedroom, wash in the bathroom and rest in the living room.

rounds.prompt: In “Helping Hands at Home”, what surprise had Father built in the garden?
rounds.explanation: Father built a tree house under the big tree, with walls, a small roof and a tiny window.

rounds.prompt: What does the word rug mean?
choices: A soft mat that covers part of the floor.
A basin where you wash with water.
A long, soft seat for two or three people.
An opening in a wall with glass that lets light in.
rounds.answer: A soft mat that covers part of the floor.
rounds.explanation: A rug lies on the floor. The other three options describe a sink, a sofa and a window.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: Which three animal homes does the poem name, and which animal lives in each one?
choices: A nest is for a bird, a hive is for a bee, and a hole is for a rabbit.
A set of rooms that is part of a big building.
Grandma Hana is coming, and she will stay for one whole week.
rounds.answer: A nest is for a bird, a hive is for a bee, and a hole is for a rabbit.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: A nest is for a bird, a hive is for a bee, and a hole is for a rabbit.

rounds.prompt: In hot, wet places, why do people build their houses high on stilts?
choices: A set of rooms that is part of a big building.
Amal made her bed and put her clean clothes in the closet. Idris picked up his toys from under the bed and put them in the toy...
So that the air can blow underneath the house.
rounds.answer: So that the air can blow underneath the house.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: So that the air can blow underneath the house.

rounds.prompt: In the bedroom, what job did Amal do and what job did Idris do?
choices: A tree house, with walls, a small roof and a tiny window.
Amal made her bed and put her clean clothes in the closet. Idris picked up his toys from under the bed and put them in the toy...
They are built from mud and dry grass, and the thick mud walls keep the rooms cool.
rounds.answer: Amal made her bed and put her clean clothes in the closet. Idris picked up his toys from under the bed and put them in the toy...
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Amal made her bed and put her clean clothes in the closet. Idris picked up his toys from under the bed and put them in the toy...

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 — Describe a Kind of Home
Speaking Game — My Home Tour
Speaking 5 — Where Does It Belong?

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: There are two windows in my room.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: After we eat, I wash the dishes.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'dining room' mean in this unit?
choices: A room where people sit at a table to eat meals.
A building where a family lives, with walls, a roof and rooms.
A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
rounds.answer: A room where people sit at a table to eat meals.
rounds.explanation: dining room: A room where people sit at a table to eat meals.

rounds.prompt: What does 'sweep the floor' mean in this unit?
choices: A building where a family lives, with walls, a roof and rooms.
A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
To clean the floor by brushing the dust away with a broom.
rounds.answer: To clean the floor by brushing the dust away with a broom.
rounds.explanation: sweep the floor: To clean the floor by brushing the dust away with a broom.

rounds.prompt: What does 'hut' mean in this unit?
choices: A home that a bird builds to keep its eggs safe.
A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
A building where a family lives, with walls, a roof and rooms.
rounds.answer: A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
rounds.explanation: hut: A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'sink'?
rounds.explanation: sink is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'stilt house'?
rounds.explanation: stilt house is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'bedroom'?
rounds.explanation: bedroom is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
A home where bees live together and make their honey.
A room where food is cooked and dishes are washed.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A room where people sit at a table to eat meals.
A seat with a back and legs, made for one person.
A soft mat that covers part of the floor.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: To put every toy, book and piece of clothing back in its place.
To clean the plates, cups and pots in water.
A home that people dig into the rock of a cliff.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: The lamp is ____ the two books.
rounds.explanation: Between means in the middle of two things, so the lamp has one book on each side of it.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence is written correctly?
choices: There is two chairs in the kitchen.
There are two chairs in the kitchen.
There am two chairs in the kitchen.
There be two chairs in the kitchen.
rounds.answer: There are two chairs in the kitchen.
rounds.explanation: Two chairs is more than one thing, so the sentence needs there are.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence talks about the future in the right way?
choices: I will to sweep the floor.
rounds.explanation: After will we use the plain verb, with no to and no -ing, and will always comes before the verb.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: Which word means a home where bees live and make honey?
rounds.explanation: Bees build a hive and store their honey inside it. A broom, a ladder and a closet are things at home, not animal homes.

rounds.prompt: In “Different Kinds of Homes”, what are adobe houses built from?
rounds.explanation: The text says people build adobe houses from mud and dry grass, and that the thick walls keep them cool.

rounds.prompt: Which of these things would you find in a bathroom?
rounds.explanation: A bathroom has a sink and a toilet for washing. A sofa belongs in the living room, a nest is a bird's home, and a ladder is not a bathroom thing.
